Goal: Spark interest, schedule a meeting.
Important: Keep it short, emphasize value.
session.consultingNotes:
Goal: Analyze needs, present solution.
Important: Listen, ask targeted questions.
session.followUpNotes:
Goal: Clarify open questions, close the deal.
Important: Reference previous conversation.

company.title: My Company
company.description: Give your AI assistant context about your company so that response suggestions during sales calls become more relevant and precise.
company.cardDescription: This information is used by the AI assistant to provide contextual and relevant responses during your sales calls.
company.whatDoYouSellPlaceholder: e.g. AI-powered customer service software that reduces response times by 70%...
company.whoDoYouSellToPlaceholder: e.g. Mid-market SaaS companies with 50-500 employees, Customer Success Managers...
company.whatProblemsDoYouSolvePlaceholder: e.g. Long response times, manual processes, low customer satisfaction...
company.whatMakesYouDifferent: What makes you different from competitors?
company.whatMakesYouDifferentPlaceholder: e.g. Only solution with real-time sentiment analysis, 99.9% uptime SLA...
company.additionalContextPlaceholder: Any other information your AI assistant should know...

landing.heroDesc: SalesCopilot listens to every sales call, transcribes live, and provides AI-powered response suggestions – before your customer finishes speaking.
landing.mockYouText: Our platform automates your entire invoicing – from creation to delivery.
landing.mockCustomerText: Sounds good, but honestly we have other priorities right now and no budget planned for this.
landing.mockObjectionText: I understand – that's exactly why it's worth a look: Our customers save an average of **12 hours per month**. May I briefly show you how that works for you?
landing.mockAlternativeText: What if we start with a free pilot project – completely risk-free for you?
landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need for better conversations
landing.featuresDesc: From preparation to follow-up – SalesCopilot supports you in every phase of the conversation.
landing.featureTranscriptionDesc: Every spoken word is instantly recognized and displayed live – directly from your browser microphone.
landing.featureAIDesc: Based on the conversation flow and customer context, the AI instantly generates fitting responses.
landing.featureObjectionDesc: "Too expensive", "No need" – typical objections are detected and countered with proven strategies.
landing.featureContextDesc: Enter customer information beforehand and the AI tailors its suggestions individually.
landing.featureSummaryDesc: After each conversation you receive a complete transcript to review and copy.
landing.featureCloseDesc: React faster, argue better, and convince more customers – in real-time.
landing.step1Desc: Enter customer information before the call – name, industry, goal. The AI uses this for better suggestions.
landing.step2Desc: Click start and make your phone or VoIP call. SalesCopilot listens through your microphone.
landing.step3Desc: While you speak, live response suggestions and objection handling appear on your screen.
landing.step4Desc: After the call you automatically get a summary with the full transcript – copy it or export it as a file.
landing.review1Text: SalesCopilot increased our close rate by 30%. The real-time suggestions are worth their weight in gold!
landing.review2Text: Finally I don't have to write notes after calls anymore. The summary and export save me at least 30 minutes every day.
landing.review3Text: Real-time objection handling is a game changer. I feel more confident in every conversation.
landing.faq1A: SalesCopilot uses your browser microphone to transcribe the conversation live. The AI automatically detects who is speaking and displays the transcript in real-time.
landing.faq2A: No, conversations are not permanently stored. The transcript is only available during and right after the session – you can copy or export it.
landing.faq3Q: Does SalesCopilot work with phone calls?
landing.faq3A: Yes! As long as you use a speaker or headset and your browser microphone is active, SalesCopilot picks up everything.
landing.faq4Q: Can I try SalesCopilot for free?
landing.faq4A: Absolutely! The free plan gives you 5 test minutes per month – no credit card, no commitment.
landing.pricingDesc: Try for free – upgrade when you're convinced.
landing.noCreditCard: No credit card required · Cancel anytime · No commitment
landing.ctaDesc: Start now and experience how AI transforms your sales conversations.
landing.trainingDesc: Practice sales conversations with realistic AI customers – personalized to your product and industry.
landing.trainingFeature1Desc: Whether SaaS, insurance, or manufacturing – the AI automatically adapts to your product and target audience.
landing.trainingFeature2Desc: From friendly starter customers to dismissive procurement managers who give you 30 seconds.
landing.trainingFeature3Desc: Cold calls, consulting sessions, and follow-ups – practice exactly the situations you face every day.
landing.trainingFeature4Desc: After each call, get scores in 5 categories, strengths, improvement suggestions, and a pro tip.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Have questions or feedback? Send us a message.
contact.name: Name
contact.sentDesc: We'll get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.emailError: Please enter a valid email address.

training.title: Sales Training
training.description: Practice sales calls with AI customers at different difficulty levels.
training.difficultyDesc: Choose how challenging the customer should be.
training.readyDesc: Click Start and have a simulated sales conversation with the AI customer. Speak out loud – your microphone will be activated.
training.personalizedDesc: AI customers use your company context and respond to your specific product, target audience, and USPs.
training.noProfileDesc: Set up your company profile so AI customers respond to your specific product – whether SaaS, insurance, or industrial machinery.
